not_run_reason: Samsung R5CY22X6MSB and Xiaomi d948ffd0 are now both visible in ADB. The remaining blocker is the external physical path: a Mac LAN host reachable from the sender and direct Mac to Android target listener reachability for normal/drop/duplicate/tamper captures.
claim_boundary: The runner closes the procedure gap only. It does not close physical attack evidence until it is executed on two phones and the generated before/send/relay/after artifacts show the expected mode behavior.
